baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Document this codebase for users and developers.
evals.expected_output: A documentation tree that separates user and developer audiences, uses Diataxis categories, and grounds claims in repository evidence.
assertions: Creates or proposes documentation/ with user and developer audience roots.
Uses tutorials, how-to-guides, reference, and explanation categories.
Avoids putting local development commands in user docs.
